originalDescription: Migrate from npm to pnpm. Install pnpm globally, create pnpm-workspace.yaml if not present, run pnpm import to convert lockfile, update CI scripts to use pnpm commands, and remove package-lock.json. pnpm provides stricter dependency resolution and better disk efficiency via content-addressable storage.
sanitizedDescription: Migrate from npm to pnpm. Install pnpm globally, create pnpm-workspace.yaml if not present, run pnpm import to convert lockfile, update CI scripts to use pnpm commands, and remove package-lock.json. pnpm provides stricter dependency resolution and better disk efficiency via content-addressable storage.
